name: Cabbage Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a skillet, sauté onion and celery in margarine for 2 minutes.
3. Add beef and salt; stir another 2 minutes.
4. Spread half the cabbage into a 2-quart baking dish and cover with half the apples.
5. Layer all the meat mixture on top of the cabbage and apple slices.
6. Cover the dish with remaining cabbage and apple slices.
7. Bake for 1 hour. Serve with mashed potatoes or noodles.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 Lean-Meat Exchange + 1 Vegetable Exchange + 1 Fat Exchange (if desired) + 1 Fruit Exchange
